title: 埃及十字架之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\27-埃及十字架之谜-埃勒里奎因.txt
summary:
During the night, Paul Roman rows a boat away from the shore, leaving a trembling Mrs. Bradwood behind after a tense exchange where she promises he will not "get" another woman. Dr. Temple observes Roman's departure from the bushes.

The following morning at the Braidwood estate, Ellery Quin finds the district attorney's car and police officers gathered at the house. Inside the living room, Detective Vance and Ketcham confront Fox, who is surrounded by Mrs. Braid, Helen, and Jonathan Lincoln. Vance accuses Fox of visiting Patsy Malone, a member of a New York gang, on the Tuesday night that Braid was murdered. Despite Fox's silence and apparent unease, the police subdue him and take his fingerprints. While Helen defends Fox's character, Ketcham notes that Fox may have been using false credentials. Vance reveals that the tip regarding Fox's movements came from an informant linked to Ellery's father.

The investigation shifts focus to the Braidwood family when Vance confronts Lincoln about a lie. Lincoln had previously claimed that Miss Braid and her mother returned together on Monday night, but a taxi driver's report reveals that only Lincoln and Miss Braid were in the vehicle. This revelation causes a confrontation between Helen and Lincoln, leading Lincoln to leave the room. Ketcham warns that everyone is now a suspect in Thomas's murder. Later, Ellery visits Professor Yadley at his house, which features an ornate courtyard and pool, arriving with a message from Garcia to study with the professor.
